Aramid Fabric, 75% meta Aramid 23% para Aramid 2% Carbon , 200 gr/m'2
200 g/m², 75% m-Aramid 23% p-Aramid 2% Carbon, Inherent Flame Retardant, Antistatic, 2/1S Twill Fabric Aramid twill fabric
technicalParameters: Fiber | 75% m-Aramid (m-AR) 23% p-Aramid (p-AR) 2% Carbon(CF) | EN ISO 2076
Tensile Strength | Warp>1500N; Weft>1000N | EN ISO 13934-1
Tear Strength | Warp>70N ; Weft>60N | EN ISO 13937-2
Dimensional Change | -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% | EN ISO 5077
Dry Cleaning Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 D01
Hot Press Fastness | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 X11
Perspiration Light Fast. | 4-5 | EN ISO 105 B07
Azo Test | No Azo Colorants. | EN ISO 14362-1
Flame and Heat Protection | Yes | EN ISO 11612

acceptedMatches.rationale: Product data explicitly states intended application as firefighter costumes/turnout gear and is certified to EN 469, the firefighting standard, directly supporting the firefighting application.

possibleButNotAccepted.reason: Fabric has antistatic (EN 1149-5) and arc protection (EN 61482) properties, which are relevant to electrical hazard protection, but no explicit statement ties it to the energy sector or electrical utility work.
Aramid FR fabrics are sometimes used in military protective gear, but no explicit military, police or tactical use is stated in the product data.
Inherent FR and heat protection could be relevant to metalworking, but no explicit mention of welding, foundry or molten metal splash use.

primary.rationale: The product explicitly states its application as firefighter costumes/turnout gear and is certified to EN 469, directly identifying firefighting as the dominant end use.

evidence: Inherent Flame Retardant Aramid Workwear Fabrics category source group
EN ISO 11612 flame and heat protection
secondary.rationale: The broad set of general protective certifications (FR, antistatic, arc, chemical) beyond firefighting-specific EN 469 supports a secondary general industrial protective workwear use, consistent with the category group description of FR aramid workwear fabrics.

alternativesConsidered.reasonNotSelected: Antistatic and arc protection properties exist but no explicit statement ties the fabric to electrical utility or energy sector use.
No explicit mention of welding, foundry or molten metal splash use despite FR and heat protection properties.
No explicit military, police or tactical application stated.
